subject: logstash pipeline fails to start
commit_message:
logstash pipeline fails to start

Issue-ID: OOM-848

Change-Id: I87bcd3165025ccf9c526c48947f91fcea1feab1a
Signed-off-by: nealch <nealch@amdocs.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Do you need to change configuration without pod restart?

Otherwise, please take a look at this suggested solution: https://github.com/kubernetes/helm/blob/master/docs/charts_tips_and_tricks.md#user-content-automatically-roll-deployments-when-configmaps-or-secrets-change

Patch Set 1:

Thanks Borislav. Logstash has two types of configuration files: onap-pipeline.conf pipeline configuration file, which defines the Logstash processing pipeline, and the logstash.yml settings file, which specify options that control Logstash startup and execution. The ONAP logstash settings file logstash.yml has config.reload.automatic value is true meaning it periodically checks if the onap-pipeline.conf pipeline configuration has changed and reloads the configuration whenever it is changed. Changes to logstash.yml would require a logstash pod restart. Changes to onap-pipeline.conf does not require a pod restart.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

> Thanks Borislav. Logstash has two types of configuration files:
 > onap-pipeline.conf pipeline configuration file, which defines the
 > Logstash processing pipeline, and the logstash.yml settings file,
 > which specify options that control Logstash startup and execution.
 > The ONAP logstash settings file logstash.yml has config.reload.automatic
 > value is true meaning it periodically checks if the
 > onap-pipeline.conf pipeline configuration has changed and reloads
 > the configuration whenever it is changed. Changes to logstash.yml
 > would require a logstash pod restart. Changes to onap-pipeline.conf
 > does not require a pod restart.

I agree with what you are saying. However is it necessary to change onap-pipeline.conf without restarting the pod? I would like to push forward the idea of adding to all charts automatic pod restart when configMap changes.
This is not blocking this commit though.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+2 Verified+1

Verified together with review https://gerrit.onap.org/r/#/c/41003/

Patch Set 1:

Borislav. Is not necessary to change onap-pipeline.conf without a pod restart.
Patch Set 2: Patch Set 1 was rebased
Change has been successfully merged by Mandeep Khinda
